mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM aro_personnel ap LEFT JOIN sys_user su ON su.id = ap.user_id
( ap.user_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR ap.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR ap.job_number LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR su.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM sys_user su WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM aro_personnel ap WHERE ap.user_id = su.id )
AND ( su.id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR su.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR su.display_nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
